Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compell Inspection Of Land; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James R. Grant, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Dan Demetris
L. Julius M. Turman, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: American Airlines, Inc.

After hearing tentative is modified. Plaintiff Dan Demetris' motion to compel inspection is Granted, inspection limited to 1 hour during business hours on a mutually convenient date. Counsel for Plaintiff shall not be permitted to interview any of defendant's employees during the inspection. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
